private_account_description:
Choose who can see your content. When your account is public, anyone on the app can view your profile, posts, and activity. Your content may also appear in search results and suggestions.

Switch to a private account to keep things more personal - only approved followers can see your posts and profile. Your content stays hidden from non-followers and won't appear in public spaces.

temple_history_first: When was the temple originally built and by whom?
temple_history_second: What are the key historical events or milestones in the temple's history?
temple_history_third: Has the temple undergone any major renovations or reconstructions?
temple_history_fourth: Are there any historical artifacts or inscriptions that provide insight into the temple's past?
temple_history_fifth: What has been the temple's significance or benefit to local community?
please_upload_at: Please upload at least one banner image
is_this_dev_the_most_prominent: Is this dev the most prominent among its avatars?
please_upload_at_least_six_sallery_image: Please upload at least six gallery image
successfully_submitted: Your contribution has been successfully submitted and is now awaiting approval. Once approved, it will go live on Devalay.
official_temple: Name should be the official temple name as recognized by the community
website_temple: Website, if available for the temple, to help users learn more about the temple
managing_temple: Managing Body is the trust or committee managing the temple
pandit_email: Email and phone number of the Pandit/ Owner of the premises
banner_image_guideline: Banner image should be clear and show the temple front or entrance
gallery_image_guideline: One or more gallery images of the temple
image_high_quality: Images should be high-quality with good lighting and no watermarks
avoid_inappropriate_image: Avoid using inappropriate, disrespectful, or unrelated images
temple_locate: Locate the Temple in the map using th search bar
auto_fIll_address: Address, city state, country, and pincode will auto-fill as per location
edit_fields: Edit the fields manually if needed
god_guideline: Select a God or Goddess from the dropdown list
god_sub_guideline: If correct option is not available, first use Add God and then Add Temple
upload_god_images: Upload a image of the deity from the temple
upload_good_high_quality_images: Images should be high-quality with good lighting and no watermarks
temple_question_history: Use the questions to inform the temple history in a single paragraph format
temple_answer_history: It is suggested to answer all the guiding question independently and then use AI to compile a coherent paragraph
temple_question_story: Use the questions to inform the legends, myths, or stories related to the temple
temple_question_etymology: Use the questions to inform etymology or naming of the temple
temple_question_architecture: Use the questions to inform the architectural style of the temple (e.g., Nagara, Dravidian, Kalinga, etc.)
event_photo_guideline: Use banner image that informs and promotes te event
event_gallery_image: Upload one or more gallery images of past events, program schedule, guidelines, maps, and other information of the event
event_locate: Locate the Event in the map using the Search bar
event_edit: Edit the fields manually if needed
event_locate_guideline: If the event is organized at a temple, select the same from Dropdown
event_select_god: Select the main Gods or Goddess related t the event from the dropdown
event_example: For example, select Shree Ganesh if the event is for Ganesh Chaturthi
spiritual_people: This helps inform the spiritual context of the event to the peoples
guideline_date: Add the date along with stat and end time for event
guideline_add_more: If the event is scheduled across multiple days, use 'Add more dates' and fil in the additional dates
guideline_visitor_date: Make sure the dates and timing is correct, so visitors know when to attend
guideline_event_celebrate: In How to Celebrate, describe the main rituals, customs, and procedure of the event
guideline_event_do: In Do's, list the actions devotees should follow (like dress code, offerings, or cleanliness)
guideline_event_dont: In Don'ts, mention what should be avoided (like mobile use, loud taking, or restricted items)
spiritual_language: Keep your language respectful and spiritual, suitable for a devotional platform
guideline_god: Use the Subtitle to mention a short phrase or aspect related to the God
guideline_god_about: In the About section, describe the mythology, significance, and other information of the god/goddess
guideline_god_information: Ensure the information is respectful, accurate, and concise
guideline_god_photo: Banner Image should visually represent the deity clearly and respectfully
guideline_god_gallery: Upload one or more Gallery Images to showcase different depictions or artworks related to the deity
guideline_god_avatar: If the God is an Avatar of another God, select the same from the dropdown List
guideline_god_avatar_selection: The avatar selection helps show the correct linking between the Gods on Devalay
guideline_god_aarti: Write the correct and complete Aarti of the God in the text box
guideline_god_heading_aarti: Only one or more Aartis with Heading
donate_title: Your contribution will greatly help maintain the temple, ensuring they remain accessible and vibrant for all. Your support and contribution enables temple upkeep, outreach to Bhakts worldwide and help keep these traditions alive. Join us in preserving these sacred traditions for future generations
tap_map_to_select_location_and_autofill_: Tap on the map to select a location and autofill address
view_in_processing: You can now view it in the Processing section.
confirm_reject_order: Are you sure you want to reject the order?

oops_comment_or_media: Oops! Please write a comment or select media.

To view your photos and videos you can choose:

• Select photos (Limited) – Only selected items
• Allow – Full access to gallery

When the system dialog appears, pick the option you prefer.
add_more_media_message:
In limited access you can:

• Add more photos/videos from gallery
• Change selection in Settings later

Choose an option below.
when_prompted_limited: When prompted, choose "Select Photos" for limited access or "Allow" for full access.
